items.name: game-icon
items.title: Game Icon
items.description: 79-glyph silhouette icon catalog with iconForItemId / iconForAction keyword resolvers — real, distinct icons for hotbar, inventory, and ability slots.

items.name: keybind-badge
items.title: Keybind Badge
items.description: Chamfered key-cap badge for showing a binding on its own control — hotbar slot corners, panel toggles.

items.name: vital-bar
items.title: Vital Bar
items.description: Slant-clipped stat bar with damage ghost-trail, segment ticks, and health/mana/stamina/xp/shield tones — presentational, value-driven.

items.name: entity-vital-bar
items.title: Entity Vital Bar
items.description: VitalBar bound to a live entity stat via useEntityStat — the one-line health bar for any entity instance.
items.docs: Requires a <GameProvider context={ctx}> ancestor from @jgengine/react. Usage: const { userId } = usePlayer(); <EntityVitalBar instanceId={userId} statId="health" />

items.name: ability-slot
items.title: Ability Slot
items.description: Four-state ability slot button — ready, cooldown (conic sweep + timer), no-resource, locked — with charge pips, just-cast flash, and a corner keybind badge.

items.name: unit-frame
items.title: Unit Frame
items.description: Portrait, name, level rosette, and stacked vital bars for a player or party-member HUD frame.

items.name: target-frame
items.title: Target Frame
items.description: Reversed UnitFrame with hostile/friendly/neutral relation coloring for an enemy or NPC target.

items.name: cast-bar
items.title: Cast Bar
items.description: Slant-clipped cast/channel progress bar with a bright leading edge and an interrupted state.

items.name: boss-bar
items.title: Boss Bar
items.description: Wide boss health bar with finial end-caps, phase-transition ticks, a name, and a sub-label.

items.name: resource-orb
items.title: Resource Orb
items.description: Circular fill-from-bottom resource orb (mana, stamina, and other tones) with a percentage readout.

items.name: heart-row
items.title: Heart Row
items.description: Row of heart pips for discrete lives or health, with an optional custom icon renderer.

items.name: xp-bar
items.title: Xp Bar
items.description: Thin tick-marked experience bar with an optional level readout.

items.name: charge-meter
items.title: Charge Meter
items.description: Slant-clipped charge or ultimate meter with tier ticks and a ready-state glow animation.

items.name: break-meter
items.title: Break Meter
items.description: Compact stagger/poise break meter that ramps color with fill and shakes and pulses when broken.

items.name: action-bar
items.title: Action Bar
items.description: Row of ability slot buttons driven by a plain slot-data array — presentational, value-driven.

items.name: ability-action-bar
items.title: Ability Action Bar
items.description: Action Bar wired to a live AbilityKit — derives slot state, cooldown, and charges from engine snapshots each tick.
items.docs: Requires a <GameProvider> ancestor from @jgengine/react — AbilityActionBar reads live ability slot state via useAbilitySlots(kit) on every render, polling the engine at ~80ms.

items.name: hotbar-selector
items.title: Hotbar Selector
items.description: Numbered hotbar slots with a selection caret and scale-up highlight for the active index.

items.name: item-grid
items.title: Item Grid
items.description: Rarity-tinted inventory/loot grid of clickable slots, driven by a plain slot-data array — presentational, value-driven.

items.name: inventory-slot-grid
items.title: Inventory Slot Grid
items.description: Item Grid wired to a live inventory container — maps engine InventorySlot state to grid slots each render.
items.docs: Requires a <GameProvider> ancestor from @jgengine/react — InventorySlotGrid reads live inventory slots via useInventory(inventoryId).

items.name: equipment-doll
items.title: Equipment Doll
items.description: Paper-doll figure flanked by left/right/bottom equipment slot wells, rarity-tinted by occupied item.

items.name: buff-tray
items.title: Buff Tray
items.description: Row of chamfered buff/debuff chips with stack counts and a remaining-duration underline, driven by a plain chip array.

items.name: moodle-tray
items.title: Moodle Tray
items.description: Buff Tray adapter for survival-game Moodle records — maps severity to buff/debuff tint and fraction to the duration ring.

items.name: loot-card
items.title: Loot Card
items.description: Rarity-bordered item tooltip card with icon, stat lines, italic affixes, and flavor text.

items.name: combat-float-layer
items.title: Combat Float Layer
items.description: Absolute-positioned layer of animated damage/heal/crit/info/error text floats, each jittered around a screen position — presentational, list-driven.

items.name: game-event-floats
items.title: Game Event Floats
items.description: CombatFloatLayer wired to the entity.floatText game event via useGame — spawns and auto-expires floats from live combat.
items.docs: Requires a <GameProvider context={ctx}> ancestor from @jgengine/react. Usage: <GameEventFloats /> subscribes to entity.floatText events and renders a CombatFloatLayer; pass mapEvent to customize the event → CombatFloatEntry mapping.

items.name: hit-marker
items.title: Hit Marker
items.description: Crosshair X-mark flash that pulses on a hit, brighter and larger on crit — presentational, active/crit-driven.

items.name: kill-feed
items.title: Kill Feed
items.description: Right-aligned scrolling feed of kill/elimination rows with friendly/hostile coloring and an accent highlight bar — presentational, list-driven.

items.name: feed-kill-feed
items.title: Feed Kill Feed
items.description: KillFeed bound to a live game feed action via useFeed, mapping raw feed entries to kill-feed rows.
items.docs: Requires a <GameProvider context={ctx}> ancestor from @jgengine/react. Usage: <FeedKillFeed action="kill" mapEntry={(entry) => ({ id: entry.id, left: entry.payload.killer, right: entry.payload.victim })} />

items.name: announcement-banner
items.title: Announcement Banner
items.description: Centered match-event banner (victory/defeat/warning/neutral) with an accent rule and optional keybind hint.

items.name: combo-counter
items.title: Combo Counter
items.description: Big pop-animated combo count with a HUD label and an optional decaying progress bar.

items.name: streak-callout
items.title: Streak Callout
items.description: Italic, skewed streak callout that intensifies size/color/pulse at higher tiers.

items.name: pickup-toast-stack
items.title: Pickup Toast Stack
items.description: Stacked, fading pickup toasts with rarity-tinted icon/label/count — presentational, list-driven.

items.name: feed-pickup-toasts
items.title: Feed Pickup Toasts
items.description: PickupToastStack bound to a live game feed action via useFeed, mapping raw feed entries to pickup toasts.
items.docs: Requires a <GameProvider context={ctx}> ancestor from @jgengine/react. Usage: <FeedPickupToasts action="pickup" mapEntry={(entry) => ({ id: entry.id, label: entry.payload.item })} />

items.name: level-up-splash
items.title: Level Up Splash
items.description: Radial-glow level-up splash that flashes in on the stat.levelUp game event via useGame and auto-dismisses.
items.docs: Requires a <GameProvider context={ctx}> ancestor from @jgengine/react. Usage: <LevelUpSplash stat="level" /> listens for stat.levelUp events via useGame and flashes the new level for durationMs.

items.name: score-readout
items.title: Score Readout
items.description: Zero-padded score counter that splits leading zeros from significant digits, with a pop-in animation on value change.

items.name: match-timer
items.title: Match Timer
items.description: MM:SS countdown clock with tick flanks and warning/critical color states, bundled with CountdownPips, a large pop-in number for a pre-round countdown.

items.name: wave-indicator
items.title: Wave Indicator
items.description: Wave-number readout with an accent underline and an optional remaining-hostiles counter for horde/survival modes.

items.name: ammo-counter
items.title: Ammo Counter
items.description: Magazine/reserve ammo readout with a low-ammo pulse, a reloading label, and a slanted divider between magazine and reserve counts.

items.name: currency-display
items.title: Currency Display
items.description: Coin-glyph currency readout with optional compact k/m/b formatting and a currency name label — presentational, value-driven.

items.name: wallet-currency-display
items.title: Wallet Currency Display
items.description: CurrencyDisplay bound to a live wallet balance via useCurrency — the one-line currency readout for any currency id.
items.docs: Requires a <GameProvider context={ctx}> ancestor from @jgengine/react. Usage: <WalletCurrencyDisplay currencyId="gold" name="Gold" />

items.name: objective-channel
items.title: Objective Channel
items.description: Slant-clipped capture/channel progress bar with friendly/hostile/neutral ownership tinting and a contested pulse.

items.name: team-score-board
items.title: Team Score Board
items.description: Two-team score comparison with a diamond divider, per-team name labels, and an optional round label — presentational, value-driven.

items.name: race-position
items.title: Race Position
items.description: Large ordinal position readout (1st/2nd/3rd) with an optional field-size suffix and a lap counter label.

items.name: arc-gauge
items.title: Arc Gauge
items.description: SVG sweep-arc gauge with tick marks, a glowing progress stroke in accent/danger/warning tones, and a centered readout + label.

items.name: event-charge-meter
items.title: Event Charge Meter
items.description: ChargeMeter bound to a live EventMeter via useEventMeter — the one-line charge bar for combo/ultimate/hype meters.
items.docs: Requires a <GameProvider context={ctx}> ancestor from @jgengine/react. Usage: const meter = useMemo(() => new EventMeter({ max: 100 }), []); <EventChargeMeter meter={meter} label="Ultimate" />

items.name: hud-panel
items.title: Hud Panel
items.description: Corner-bracketed HUD panel shell with a chamfer-free titled header — the base chrome every panel/overlay stacks on.

items.name: hud-label
items.title: Hud Label
items.description: Small uppercase tracked-letterspacing caption for HUD field headers and table columns.

items.name: accent-rule
items.title: Accent Rule
items.description: Thin glowing gradient divider used under panel headers and section breaks.

items.name: quest-tracker
items.title: Quest Tracker
items.description: Stacked objective-list HUD widget — quest title rule plus checkable/countable objective rows, value-driven.

items.name: journal-quest-tracker
items.title: Journal Quest Tracker
items.description: QuestTracker bound to the live quest journal via useQuestJournal, mapped through a describe() projector.
items.docs: Requires a <GameProvider context={ctx}> ancestor from @jgengine/react. Usage: <JournalQuestTracker describe={(quest) => ({ id: quest.questId, title: quest.questId, objectives: quest.objectives.map((o) => ({ id: o.id, label: o.id, count: o.progress, target: o.count, complete: o.complete })) })} />

items.name: scoreboard-overlay
items.title: Scoreboard Overlay
items.description: Full-screen modal scoreboard with configurable columns, numeric-aware alignment, and highlight/team-color row accents.

items.name: rank-list
items.title: Rank List
items.description: Ranked leaderboard rows in a titled panel — gold star on first place, alternating row shading, value-driven.

items.name: stat-leaderboard
items.title: Stat Leaderboard
items.description: RankList bound to a live stat leaderboard via useLeaderboard, with optional userId-to-display-name resolution.
items.docs: Requires a <GameProvider context={ctx}> ancestor from @jgengine/react. Usage: <StatLeaderboard stat="kills" scope="global" limit={10} />

items.name: combat-log-panel
items.title: Combat Log Panel
items.description: Auto-scrolling tone-colored combat log in a titled panel — damage/heal/system lines fade with age, value-driven.

items.name: feed-combat-log
items.title: Feed Combat Log
items.description: CombatLogPanel bound to a live game feed action via useFeed, mapped through a mapLine() projector.
items.docs: Requires a <GameProvider context={ctx}> ancestor from @jgengine/react. Usage: <FeedCombatLog action="combat.hit" mapLine={(entry, i) => ({ id: String(i), text: String(entry.data), tone: "damage" })} />

items.name: vendor-panel
items.title: Vendor Panel
items.description: Shop listing panel with rarity-colored item names, stock counts, affordability-aware pricing, and a balance readout.

items.name: crafting-panel
items.title: Crafting Panel
items.description: Recipe list panel with per-input have/need coloring and an in-progress craft-fraction bar under each recipe.

items.name: dialogue-panel
items.title: Dialogue Panel
items.description: Notched dialogue box with speaker nameplate, portrait well, and skill-check-annotated branching choices.

items.name: menu-button
items.title: Menu Button
items.description: Slant-clipped menu button with primary/ghost/danger variants and an optional corner keybind badge.

items.name: menu-list
items.title: Menu List
items.description: Keyboard/pointer-navigable vertical menu with a selection wedge, accent underline, and per-entry keybind badges.

items.name: title-screen
items.title: Title Screen
items.description: Full-screen title card with headline, subtitle, optional backdrop layer, version tag, and a MenuList of entries.

items.name: pause-screen
items.title: Pause Screen
items.description: Blurred full-screen pause overlay with a title and a MenuList of entries.

items.name: death-screen-view
items.title: Death Screen View
items.description: Presentational death overlay with a popping title, respawn countdown or respawn MenuButton — value-driven, no engine reads.

items.name: death-overlay-bound
items.title: Death Overlay Bound
items.description: DeathScreenView bound to the local player's dead state via useLocalPlayerDead — renders nothing while alive.
items.docs: Requires a <GameProvider context={ctx}> ancestor from @jgengine/react. Usage: <DeathOverlayBound statId="health" onRespawn={respawn} />

items.name: results-screen
items.title: Results Screen
items.description: Victory/defeat/draw results overlay with an animated outcome title, a two-column stat grid, and an optional MenuList.

items.name: loading-screen
items.title: Loading Screen
items.description: Full-screen loading card with a slant-clipped determinate progress bar or an indeterminate sheen sweep, plus an optional rotating tip line.

items.name: slider-row
items.title: Slider Row
items.description: Labeled pointer-draggable slant-clipped slider row with a formatted value readout — settings-menu style.

items.name: toggle-row
items.title: Toggle Row
items.description: Labeled two-segment on/off toggle row rendered as slant-clipped chips — settings-menu style.

items.name: settings-group
items.title: Settings Group
items.description: Titled settings section with an accent rule underline, wrapping SliderRow/ToggleRow children in a vertical stack.

items.name: reticle
items.title: Reticle
items.description: Configurable crosshair reticle — dot, cross, circle, chevron, or shotgun spread pattern — with an optional hit-flash tick overlay.

items.name: lock-on-marker
items.title: Lock-On Marker
items.description: Rotating corner-bracket lock-on reticle that snaps into a diamond frame when a target is acquired, with an optional label.

items.name: damage-direction-indicator
items.title: Damage Direction Indicator
items.description: Screen-edge arc that flashes toward the source of incoming damage, scaled by intensity.

items.name: waypoint-marker
items.title: Waypoint Marker
items.description: World-space HUD marker for objectives, danger, allies, or loot, with an off-screen clamp arrow, label, and distance readout.

items.name: hud-marker-layer
items.title: Hud Marker Layer
items.description: Renders a full-screen layer of WaypointMarker instances from a list of HUD markers.

items.name: chat-bubble
items.title: Chat Bubble
items.description: Over-entity speech bubble for proximity chat — presentational, value-driven.

items.name: entity-chat-bubble
items.title: Entity Chat Bubble
items.description: ChatBubble bound to a live entity's latest proximity chat message via useEntityChatBubble — the one-line speech bubble for any entity instance.
items.docs: Requires a <GameProvider context={ctx}> ancestor from @jgengine/react. Usage: project the entity's world position to screen-percent x/y and pass it down: <EntityChatBubble instanceId={userId} x={screenX} y={screenY} />

items.name: interaction-ring
items.title: Interaction Ring
items.description: Circular interact-hold progress ring with a center keybind badge and optional label.

items.name: cartridge-panels
items.title: Cartridge Panels
items.description: Standard panel bindings for @jgengine/shell/cartridge: vital/xp/timer/score/ability-bar HUD items, upgrade-draft modal, and win/lose screens composed from the jgengine UI kit.

items.name: mount
items.title: Mount
items.description: One-call React root mount for a PlayableGame: mountGame(game) renders GameHost into #root.

items.name: schematic-diagram
items.title: Schematic Diagram
items.description: Fixed-panel node+edge schematic independent of world positions — circuit layouts, rail networks, heist floor plans, with dashed forecast edges.

items.name: progress-strip
items.title: Progress Strip
items.description: Linear 1D minimap: lanes with moving markers and live/forecast segments — race standings along a lap, couriers along a line.

items.name: loop-dial
items.title: Loop Dial
items.description: Radial position-around-a-loop dial: markers at cycle fractions plus live/forecast arc windows — laps, patrols, rotation schedules.
